snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

snippet.title: KEEP BRAWL ALIVE!
snippet.description:
Get a free Buffie, the Royale Trunk skin and more, but you gotta KEEP BRAWL ALIVE! 😱

❤️‍🔥 Complete your 6 daily wins every day to fill the track bar! The more players complete them, the better the rewards for the whole community!
❤️‍🔥 This means the only way to keep progressing is to tell your friends to do the same!
❤️‍🔥 Throughout the whole event, there’ll be 2 guaranteed Chaos Drops at the end of your daily wins (to encourage the non-believers!)
❤️‍🔥 There’s also an extra Chaos Drop every day if the community completes a daily social task, look for them daily on the community event screen!
❤️‍🔥 FIRST DAILY SOCIAL TASK: Go to your favorite content creator channel and comment something nice! If 100 Creators respond, everyone will get a Chaos Drop the next day!

💥 REWARDS 💥
• Chaos Drops
• Power Points
• Gems
• Royale Trunk Skin
• Starr Drops
• Random Buffie
• XP Doubler
• Bling
• PPXP
• Trophy Box
• 2 Chaos Drops every day from the Daily Wins
• Extra Chaos Drops every day from the social tasks

🎁 GIVEAWAY 🎁

Everyone who does their daily social task will also participate in our daily Gem giveaway! We’ll go through all the players who have done the task and 1 random lucky winner will get ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND Gems! There’ll be a different winner every day, so do the tasks!

The event starts TODAY and ends on April 24th at 8:00 AM UTC, so... LET'S #KEEPBRAWLALIVE! 🤘

snippet.description:
Le secret est enfin révélé 🤫

À Contre-Sens 2 : Londres arrive en juin sur Prime Video

SYNOSPIS: 
Après les événements explosifs de My Fault : London, Noah et Nick reviennent, plus forts, plus proches et plus amoureux que jamais. Mais alors que la vie commence à les tirer dans des directions différentes, leur relation fait face à son plus grand défi. Noah se rend à Oxford pour poursuivre ses études, tandis que Nick se retrouve submergé par les exigences croissantes du travail. Quand de nouvelles personnes entrent dans leurs vies, suscitant des émotions inattendues et une jalousie persistante, des fissures commencent à se former. La confiance est mise à l'épreuve, les passions s'enflamment, et le lien qu'ils pensaient indestructible commence à se fragiliser. Maintenant au carrefour, Noah et Nick doivent décider : lutter pour l'amour qui les a réunis... ou risquer de le perdre à jamais.

snippet.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

snippet.title: ILS ONT DES ARMES À FEU MAINTENANT ?! -Resident Evil 9 : Requiem- Ep.10
snippet.description:
Il faut croire que la coordination oeil-main, ça continue de marcher même quand il te manque soit l'un, soit l'autre.

Resident Evil 9 : Requiem ! La suite tant attendue de la série d'horreur qui, mine de rien, représente plus d'épisodes sur la chaîne que Witcher 3 et Detroit réunis ! Et oui ! Au programme : un Léon avec trop de bouteille pour son propre bien, une choupette autiste aux mimines minuscules, et un docteur techno-Frankenstein à l'acuité visuelle douteuse ! Je voudrais faire une description plus longue, mais tout est mystique, tout est horrifique, et je ne sais même pas encore ce qui se passe vraiment ! Le drama !

Toujours merci à SpongePierre, éternel miniaturiste agréé.

Vous pouvez aussi m'suivre sur Twitter/X :
http://x.com/RoiLennon

Bisous et à la prochaine !

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.description:

Lyrics for "Simon & Garfunkel - The Sounds of Silence"

[Verse 1]
Hello, darkness, my old friend
I've come to talk with you again
Because a vision softly creeping
Left its seeds while I was sleeping
And the vision that was planted in my brain
Still remains
Within the sound of silence

[Verse 2]
In restless dreams, I walked alone
Narrow streets of cobblestone
'Neath the halo of a street lamp
I turned my collar to the cold and damp
When my eyes were stabbed by the flash of a neon light
That split the night
And touched the sound of silence

[Verse 3]
And in the naked light, I saw
Ten thousand people, maybe more
People talking without speaking
People hearing without listening
People writing songs that voices never shared
And no one dared
Disturb the sound of silence

[Verse 4]
"Fools," said I, "You do not know
Silence, like a cancer, grows
Hear my words that I might teach you
Take my arms that I might reach you"
But my words, like silent raindrops, fell
And echoed in the wells of silence

[Verse 5]
And the people bowed and prayed
To the neon god they made
And the sign flashed out its warning
In the words that it was forming
And the sign said, "The words of the prophets are written on the subway walls
And tenement halls
And whispered in the sound of silence"

When my eyes were stabbed by the flash of a neon light
That split the night
And touched the sound of silence

[Verse 3]
And in the naked light, I saw
Ten thousand people, maybe more
People talking without speaking
People hearing without listening
People writing songs that voices never shared
And no one dared
Disturb the sound of silence

[Verse 4]
"Fools," said I, "You do not know
Silence, like a cancer, grows
Hear my words that I might teach you
Take my arms that I might reach you"
But my words, like silent raindrops, fell
And echoed in the wells of silence

[Verse 5]
And the people bowed and prayed
To the neon god they made
And the sign flashed out its warning
In the words that it was forming
And the sign said, "The words of the prophets are written on the subway walls
And tenement halls
And whispered in the sound of silence"

snippet.title: George Michael - Careless Whisper (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | George Michael
💿 Canción | Careless Whisper
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 10/11/2006
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop, Soul

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“Careless Whisper” de George Michael es una confesión cargada de culpa donde el protagonista entiende demasiado tarde el valor de la relación que arruinó. Entre miradas incómodas en la pista de baile y recuerdos que pesan más que la música, la canción retrata el momento exacto en que la conciencia no deja seguir fingiendo. El “baile” se convierte en metáfora de la conexión que ya no puede recuperarse, porque la traición rompió el ritmo para siempre.

📲 Sígue a "George Michael" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/georgemofficial

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Intro]
Oh, woah, woah, oh

[Verse 1]
I feel so unsure
As I take your hand and lead you to the dance floor
As the music dies, something in your eyes
Calls to mind a silver screen and all its sad goodbyes

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Verse 2]
Time can never mend
The careless whispers of a good friend
To the heart and mind, ignorance is kind
There's no comfort in the truth, pain is all you'll find

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend (Shoulda known better, yeah)
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Never without your love

[Instrumental Break]

[Verse 3]
Tonight, the music seems so loud
I wish that we could lose this crowd
Maybe it's better this way
We'd hurt each other with the things we want to say
We could have been so good together
We could have lived this dance forever
But now, who's gonna dance with me?
Please stay

[Chorus]
And I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Instrumental Break]

[Outro]
(Now that you're gone) Now that you're gone
(Now that you're gone) Was what I did so wrong, so wrong
That you had to leave me alone?

#GeorgeMichael #CarelessWhisper #Pop

snippet.title: TOUT LE MONDE PARLE DE SPIDER MAN BRAND NEW DAY, MAIS TOUT LE MONDE SE TROMPE !
snippet.description:
SPIDER MAN BRAND NEW DAY SE PASSE DEJA SUR BATTLEWORLD !

Dans la bande-annonce de Spider-Man: Brand New Day, un détail passe complètement inaperçu… mais il pourrait bien révéler la vérité sur le futur du MCU.

Une fiche de cinéma publiée aux États-Unis indique que le film se déroule après les événements de Avengers: Doomsday.
Si cette information est correcte, alors tout change : la timeline, le rôle de Spider-Man… et surtout la nature du monde dans lequel il évolue.

Parce que ce que les images montrent pose un problème.
Un monde censé être détruit… mais qui semble parfaitement stable.
Un Peter Parker isolé… mais qui agit comme si quelque chose l’empêchait d’être Spider-Man.
Et surtout… ce reflet dans ses yeux.

Les faits indiquent que ce reflet est volontaire.
Marvel a déjà utilisé ce procédé visuel dans Ironheart pour matérialiser une présence invisible.
Une présence qui observe.
Une présence qui influence.

Dans les comics One More Day, Peter Parker conclut un pacte avec Mephisto pour sauver Tante May… en échange d’une partie de sa vie.
Et ce pacte crée une nouvelle réalité. Stable. Fonctionnelle. Mais fausse.

Et si Brand New Day reprenait exactement ce schéma ?

Une réalité reconstruite après Doomsday.
Un monde contrôlé.
Un New York qui pourrait déjà être une partie de Battleworld, comme dans Secret Wars.

Et si ce reflet… c’était Mephisto ?

Alors Spider-Man ne serait plus seulement un héros.
Il serait le premier personnage à réaliser que le MCU… est déjà altéré.

Et ça change absolument tout pour la suite : Doomsday, Secret Wars, et le rôle de Doctor Doom.

Dites-moi ce que vous en pensez.

Est-ce que Marvel est en train de cacher une réalité post-Doomsday depuis le début ?
Ou est-ce qu’on est face à une simple erreur de synopsis ?
